sys_metadata_link.payload:
true text 89137fd0db4420106a58ef92ca961903 false false false false false 6a0e0e96db4d99501e1792c5d4961956 ddba8256db4d99501e1792c5d496195a In (Tasker 2.7.x and earlier it was necessary to assign Tasker roles to Organizational Unit (OU) member KB0010006 2022-08-09 Has Role Explicitly Count kb_knowledge rjoy 2022-08-09 22:41:54 global / 1a79355cdb1111901e1792c5d49619c0 4 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:30:24 19 In (Tasker 2.7.x and earlier it was necessary to assign Tasker roles to Organizational Unit (OU) member records or out of the box ServiceNow user records. In Tasker 2.8 (and newer), manually assigning Tasker roles to users remains an option.

Users assigned a Tasker role prior to enabling Groups Management display in the Has Role Explicitly list and the “Users explicitly assigned to role” message displays in the left-hand column, underneath the group name.

Tip: After enabling Groups Management, any users assigned a role on their OU member record are automatically added to the Tasker group for the role. However, adding Tasker roles to a user record, via ServiceNow platform, will add the user to the Has Role Explictily list.

Select “Let’s fix it” to automatically add users to the selected group.

In the example below, there are four users explicitly assigned the TAA role but not in the Tasker Application Administrator group.

Selecting “Let’s fix it” removes users from the list.

Confirmation messages display for each user moved. There are two options to clear messages:

  1. Close each message.
  2. Refresh the browser. This is useful for a large number of messages (for example moving Tasker users from the Has Role Explicitly list to Group Members.) Save any changes to group selections before refreshing the screen, as refreshing the browser clears any unsaved changes.

Has Role Explicitly fields:

  • User displays the user name.
  • Role displays the Tasker Role for the user.
  • State indicates if the user record is Active or Inactive.
  • Inherited indicates if the Tasker role is inherited from another Tasker role. For example, users added to the Global Template Designer group inherit the Personal Template Designer role. In this example, you must still add the user who received the inherited Personal Template Designer role to the Personal Template Designer group.
  • Inheritance Count displays the total number of inherited Tasker roles for the user.
  • Context Menu: Selecting the content menu displays options to view the User Role list in ServiceNow and options to export to PDF, Excel, and CSV.
]]> General 0 2100-01-01 published #eff0f1 700000 true image/png Pasted image.png 514cbb2dfd5a8c1e08f8cd094b5a111ab9156cdbca0540c8e585d554ad8258d9 319 709 43476 41289 available csloyer 2022-09-22 15:28:54 a05cbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f5 3 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:28:55 kb_knowledge 1a79355cdb1111901e1792c5d49619c0  44652 0 a05cbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f5 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:28:54 e05cbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f5  10404 1 a05cbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f5 csloyer 2022-09-22 15:28:54 645cbad2dbc699101e1792c5d49619f5
